title: Cross-sells
excerpt: Enable customers to purchase complementary products at checkout by using cross-sells. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Stripe-hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/cross-sells.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted) - [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/cross-sells.md?payment-ui=embedded-page)
